card.name: Emperor Almicar
card.text: Other creatures you control get +1/+1. When Emperor Almicar enters, if you cast it, look at the top five cards of your library. You may put a creature, Vehicle, or Equipment card with mana value 3 or less from among them onto the battlefield. Put the rest on the bottom of your library in a random order.

card.name: The Living Forge
card.text: Whenever The Living Forge attacks, choose one — • Create a token that's a copy of target Equipment you control. When you do, attach it to up to one target creature you control. • Create a token that's a copy of target Vehicle you control. Until end of turn, it becomes an artifact creature that's tapped and attacking.

card.name: Druno, Marquisian Collector
card.text: If an opponent would create one or more tokens, instead you and that player each create those tokens. If an opponent would draw a card except the first one they draw in each of their draw steps, instead you both draw a card.

card.name: Tell No Tales
card.text: Destroy all artifacts and creatures.

card.name: Marquisian Flagship
card.text: Whenever Marquisian Flagship attacks, return target nonland permanent card with mana value 3 or less from your graveyard to the battlefield tapped. Crew 3

card.name: Spectral Sabers
Almicar's Striker // Back in Action
card.text:
---
Return target nonland permanent card with mana value 3 or less from your graveyard to the battlefield. (Then exile this card. You may cast the creature later from exile.)

card.name: Crimza Taal Envoy
card.text: When Crimza Taal Envoy enters, you may search your library for an artifact card or a card with an Adventure, reveal it, then shuffle and put that card on top.

card.name: Marquisian Commander // Supply Run
card.text:
When Marquisian Commander enters, you may attach target Equipment you control to it.
---
Create a Weapon token. (It's an Equipment artifact with "Equipped creature gets +1/+1" and equip {2}. Then exile this card. You may cast the creature later from exile.)

card.name: Imperial Armorer
card.text: Whenever another creature you control enters, create a Weapon token and attach it to that creature. (It's an Equipment artifact with "Equipped creature gets +1/+1" and equip {2}.)

card.name: Windrider Roc
card.text: Flying When this creature enters, destroy up to one target artifact.

card.name: Familiar's Foil
Refurbish
card.text: Return target artifact card from your graveyard to the battlefield.

card.name: Encased in Glass
card.text: Enchant nonland permanent Enchanted permanent loses all types and abilities and is an artifact with "{T}: Add {C}."

card.name: Marquisian Skyship
card.text: Flying Whenever Marquisian Skyship or another artifact you control enters, create a 1/1 white Soldier creature token. This ability triggers only once each turn. Crew 2 (Tap any number of creatures you control with total power 2 or more: This Vehicle becomes an artifact creature until end of turn.)

card.name: Maroon
card.text: Exile target tapped creature. Phase out all Vehicles that creature crewed this turn. (Treat them and anything attached to them as though they don't exist until their controller's next turn.)

card.name: Ironworks Twinblades
card.text: Equipped creature gets +1/+1 and has double strike. Equip {5}{W}. This ability costs {1} less to activate for each creature you control.

card.name: Davijan, Trenchbound Titan
card.text: Trample, hexproof Davijan enters with ten slumber counters on it and can't attack or block as long as it has a slumber counter on it. Whenever you cast a spell, remove a slumber counter from Davijan. If that spell was a Merfolk, remove two instead. It it was a Kraken, Leviathan, Octopus, or Serpent, remove three instead.

card.name: Saddled Scuttleback
card.text: When Saddled Scuttleback enters, you may search your library for a Crab, Fish, Jellyfish, Kraken, Leviathan, Merfolk, Nautilus, Octopus, Otter, Oyster, Pirate, Seal, Serpent, Shark, Shrimp, Sponge, Squid, Starfish, Trilobite, Turtle, Whale, or Island card, reveal it, put it into your hand, then shuffle.

card.name: Shifting Sailor // Dastardly Heist
card.text:
You may have Shifting Sailor enter as a copy of a creature or artifact you control.
---
Gain control of target creature or artifact. (Then exile this card. You may cast the creature later from exile.)

card.name: Glorybound Seablade
card.text: Landlubbers can't block Pirates. Whenever one or more Pirates you control deals combat damage to a player who controls a Landlubber, draw a card. {1}: Target creature becomes a Landlubber until end of turn.

card.name: Whelming Wave
card.text: Return all creatures to their owners' hands except for Krakens, Leviathans, Octopuses, and Serpents.

card.name: Thalassophobia
card.text: When Thalassophobia enters, draw a card. Whenever you draw a card, create a tapped 1/1 blue Tentacle creature token. Sacrifice Thalassophobia and eight Tentacles: Search your library for a Kraken, Leviathan, Octopus, or Serpent creature card and put it onto the battlefield, then shuffle.

card.name: Brineborn Cutthroat
card.text: Flash Whenever you cast a spell during an opponent's turn, put a +1/+1 counter on Brineborn Cutthroat.

card.name: Ghostcrew Captain // Ghost Story
card.text:
Flash When Ghostcrew Captain enters, tap it and up to one target creature or artifact you don't control.
---
Tap up to two target creatures. (Then exile this card. You may cast the creature later from exile.)

card.name: Hullhide Colossus
card.text: Vigilance Whenever another artifact you control enters, put a +1/+1 counter on Hullhide Colossus.

card.name: Deep Sea Devastator
card.text: Deep Sea Devastator can't be blocked except by Krakens, Leviathans, Octopuses, and Serpents. When Deep Sea Devastator enters, if you control another Kraken, Leviathan, Octopus, or Serpent, you may return target creature or Vehicle to its owner's hand.

card.name: Uncharted Wonders
card.text: Draw two cards, then plunder twice. (Create a Treasure token, or sacrifice an artifact to draw a card. Then repeat this process.)

card.name: Skysail Galleon
card.text: Flying Whenever Skysail Galleon deals combat damage to a player or planeswalker, draw a card. Crew 1 (Tap any number of creatures you control with total power 1 or more: This Vehicle becomes an artifact creature until end of turn.)

card.name: Ironworks Frigate
card.text: Vigilance Whenever you cast a noncreature spell, you may have Ironworks Frigate become an artifact creature until end of turn. Crew 3 (Tap any number of creatures you control with total power 3 or more: This Vehicle becomes an artifact creature until end of turn.)

card.name: Trenchcaller Oracle // Invoke the Tides
card.text:
Vigilance Whenever you draw your second card each turn, put a +1/+1 counter on Trenchcaller Oracle.
---
Draw two cards, then discard a card. (Then exile this card. You may cast the creature later from exile.)

card.name: Avarice
card.text: Flying Whenever you cast a spell, you may pay life equal to its mana value. If you do, copy it. You may choose new targets for the copy. (A copy of a permanent spell becomes a token.)

card.name: Dreadtide Flagship
card.text: Menace Exile an artifact or creature card from your graveyard: Dreadtide Flagship becomes an artifact creature until end of turn. Crew 1

card.name: Dezan, Ironsoul Sell-Sword
card.text: Menace Ward—Pay 3 life. Equipment you control have "Equip—Pay 3 life."

card.name: Crimza Taal Infiltrator
card.text: Deathtouch At the beginning of your end step, you lose 1 life and plunder. (Create a Treasure token, or sacrifice an artifact to draw a card.)

card.name: Abyssal Breach
card.text: Choose a creature you control. Each other creature gets -X/-X until end of turn, where X is the chosen creature's power.

card.name: Alkar of the Floating Horde
card.text: Menace When Alkar of the Floating Horde enters, exile up to one target creature or Vehicle, then plunder. You may cast a card exiled this way for as long as it remains exiled. Spend only mana produced by Treasures to do so. (To plunder, create a Treasure token, or sacrifice an artifact to draw a card.)

card.name: Raider's Remains // Death's Toll
card.text:
Raider's Remains can't block. You may cast Raider's Remains as an Adventure from your graveyard. (You may play it from exile later.)
---
Target player loses 1 life and you gain 1 life. (Then exile this card. You may cast the creature later from exile.)

card.name: Dreadtide Scrounger
card.text: Deathtouch {2}{B}, Sacrifice another creature or artifact: You gain 1 life and you draw a card.

card.name: Marquisian Enforcer
card.text: {4}{B}, Exile Marquisian Enforcer from your graveyard: Create a tapped 4/4 green Serpent creature token with trample.

card.name: Forsaken Cutthroat
card.text: Deathtouch Whenever you sacrifice a creature or artifact, create a 1/1 white Spirit creature token with flying. This ability triggers only once per turn.

card.name: Azla's Monstrosity
card.text: As an additional cost to cast this spell, pay {1}{B}, sacrifice a creature, or discard a card. When Azla's Monstrosity enters, each opponent sacrifices a creature of their choice and discards a card.

card.name: Dreadtide Grunt // Death's Bounty
card.text:
{1}, Sacrifice a creature or artifact: Put a +1/+1 counter on Dreadtide Grunt.
---
Sacrifice a creature or artifact. When you do, draw two cards. (Then exile this card. You may cast the creature later from exile.)

card.name: March of the Dreadtide
card.text: When March of the Dreadtide enters, plunder. (Create a Treasure token, or sacrifice an artifact to draw a card.) Whenever you draw your second card each turn, create a 2/2 black Zombie creature token.

card.name: What Lurks Beneath
card.text: When What Lurks Beneath enters, you may return target creature card from your graveyard to your hand. {3}{B}{B}, Sacrifice What Lurks Beneath: Return target creature card from your graveyard to the battlefield. It can't block this turn.

card.name: Down With the Ship
card.text: Each player sacrifices two creatures of their choice. For each creature you sacrificed this way, plunder. (Create a Treasure token, or sacrifice an artifact to draw a card.)

card.name: Drown
card.text: Destroy target non-Kraken, non-Leviathan, non-Octopus, non-Serpent creature.

card.name: Zephyr Swashbuckler // Withering Winds
card.text:
Flying
---
Creatures your opponents control get -1/-1 until end of turn. (Then exile this card. You may cast the creature later from exile.)

card.name: Malvo, Edgeseeker Admiral // Set Sail
card.text:
Whenever you cast an Adventure spell of a permanent, create a token that's a copy of that permanent. That token gains haste. Sacrifice it at the beginning of the next end step.
---
Choose any number of other permanents you control with Adventures. You may cast any number of Adventures from among them without paying their mana costs.

prop.type: Legendary Creature — Azra Scout // Sorcery — Adventure

card.name: Charismatic Captain
card.text: At the beginning of combat on your turn, create a 2/1 black Pirate creature token with "This creature can't block." It gains haste until end of turn. Whenever Charismatic Captain attacks, gain control of target artifact with mana value less than or equal to the number of attacking Pirates you control.

card.name: Mapcaster Mage
card.text: Flash When Mapcaster Mage enters, you may cast a copy of an Adventure spell from target permanent card with an Adventure in your graveyard. (You still pay its costs.)

card.name: Tavern Gambler // All In
card.text:
When Tavern Gambler enters, exile up to one target instant or sorcery card from your graveyard. Until end of turn, you may cast that card.
---
Search your library for a card, put that card into your hand, discard a card at random, then shuffle. (Then exile this card. You may cast the creature later from exile.)

card.name: Firebrand Flagship
card.text: Whenever Firebrand Flagship attacks, create a token that's a copy of a creature that crewed it this turn. That token enters tapped and attacking. Exile the token at end of combat. Crew 3

card.name: Free Harbor
card.text: If you would draw a card, instead exile the top card of each player's library. You may play cards exiled this way until end of turn.

card.name: Powder Monkeys
card.text: When Powder Monkeys enters, choose one — • It deals 1 damage to any target. • Destroy target artifact.

card.name: Twinshot Renegade
card.text: When Twinshot Renegade enters, plunder. (Create a Treasure token, or sacrifice an artifact to draw a card.) Whenever you sacrifice a permanent, Twinshot Renegade deals 1 damage to any target. This ability triggers only once each turn.

card.name: Glorybound Brute // Reckless Raiding
card.text:
Trample
---
Discard a card. If you do, draw two cards. (Then exile this card. You may cast the creature later from exile.)

card.name: Macrawcodiles
card.text: Haste Whenever you cast an Adventure spell, put a +1/+1 counter on Macrawcodiles. It gains flying until end of turn.

card.name: Fleetfront Galleon
card.text: Trample As long as it's your turn, other creatures you control get +1/+0. Crew 3 (Tap any number of creatures you control with total power 3 or more: This Vehicle becomes an artifact creature until end of turn.)

card.name: Deserter's Dinghy
card.text: Haste, menace When Deserter's Dinghy enters, it becomes an artifact creature until end of turn. Crew 2 (Tap any number of creatures you control with total power 2 or more: This Vehicle becomes an artifact creature until end of turn.)

card.name: Jadon's Messenger
card.text: {R}, Sacrifice an artifact: Return target artifact card from your graveyard to the battlefield. That artifact gains haste until end of turn and deals damage equal to its mana value to Jadon's Messenger. Activate only as a sorcery.

card.name: Frenetic Freebooter // Good Fortune
card.text:
During your turn, Frenetic Freebooter has first strike.
---
Plunder. (Create a Treasure token, or sacrifice an artifact to draw a card. Then exile this card. You may cast the creature later from exile.)

card.name: Davijan's Disciple
card.text: {T}: Add {G}. {4}{G}, {T}, Sacrifice Davijan's Disciple: Create a tapped 4/4 green Serpent creature token with trample.

card.name: Gangplank Marauders // All Aboard!
card.text:
When Gangplank Marauders enters, other creatures you control get +1/+1 and gain trample until end of turn.
---
Exile the top six cards of your library. Put up to two creature cards with mana value 3 or less from among them onto the battlefield. Shuffle the rest into your library.

card.name: Kelpscale Serpent // Tidal Terror
card.text:
{T}: Untap another target permanent.
---
Create an X/X blue Kraken creature token. (Then exile this card. You may cast the creature later from exile.)

card.name: Octotyrant
card.text: When Octotyrant enters, create eight 1/1 blue Tentacle creature tokens.

card.name: Dreadtide Hellraiser // Churn the Waters
card.text:
When Dreadtide Hellraiser enters, return target card from your graveyard to your hand.
---
Mill three cards. You gain 3 life. (Then exile this card. You may cast the creature later from exile.)

card.name: Kiora's Coiler
card.text: Trample Whenever another Kraken, Leviathan, Octopus, or Serpent you control enters, Kiora's Coiler fights up to one target creature.

card.name: Malvo's Quartermaster
card.text: When Malvo's Quartermaster enters, plunder. (Create a Treasure token, or sacrifice an artifact to draw a card.) {T}, Sacrifice a Treasure: Create a tapped colorless land token named Everywhere that is every basic land type. (It has "{T}: Add {W}, {U}, {B}, {R}, or {G}.")

card.name: Imperial Expeditioner
card.text: When Imperial Expeditioner enters, create a 1/1 white Soldier creature token. Imperial Expeditioner gets +1/+1 for each creature you control.

card.name: Great Wight
card.text: Great Wight can't be blocked by creatures with power 2 or less. Great Wight enters with a number of +1/+1 counters on it equal to the greatest power among creature cards in your graveyard.

card.name: Dry Land
card.text: Search your library for a basic land card, put it onto the battlefield tapped, then shuffle. Plunder. (Create a Treasure token, or sacrifice an artifact to draw a card.)

card.name: Intrepid Expedition
card.text: Creatures you control get +2/+2 until end of turn. Creatures you control with Adventures get an additional +1/+1 and gain trample until end of turn.

card.name: Fortunate Flotsam
card.text: You gain 4 life and mill four cards. When you do, return up to one target card from your graveyard to your hand. Exile Fortunate Flotsam.

card.name: Horizon Communer // Land Ho!
card.text:
Whenever Horizon Communer attacks, you may pay {W}{U}{B}{R}{G}. If you do, create a 3/3 green Elemental creature token.
---
Create a tapped colorless land token named Everywhere that is every basic land type. (Then exile this card. You may cast the creature later from exile.)

card.name: Rallying Captain // Reinforcements
card.text:
Creature tokens you control get +1/+1.
---
Create a token that's a copy of a token you control. (Then exile this card. You may cast the creature later from exile.)

card.name: Jadon, Who Fells the Mighty // Daring Pursuit
card.text:
[+1]: Plunder (Create a Treasure token, or sacrifice an artifact to draw a card.) [-3]: Create three 2/1 black Pirate creature tokens with "This creature can't block."
---
Destroy target creature or planeswalker. (Then exile this card. You may cast the planeswalker later from exile.)

card.name: Dawson, Out for Blood
card.text: Whenever you activate a loyalty ability of Dawson, target opponent may pay 2 life. If they don't, copy that ability. You may choose new targets for the copy. (The loyalty is not paid twice.) [+1]: Create a tapped 1/1 colorless Construct artifact creature token. [-2]: Choose a nonland permanent type. Each player sacrifices a permanent of the chosen type of their choice.

card.name: Ingrid Farjalla
card.text: You may play land cards from your graveyard. [+1]: Surveil 2. You gain 2 life. [-3]: Exile target creature or artifact. Its controller may search their library for a basic land card, put that card onto the battlefield tapped, then shuffle. [-6]: For each land you control, create a 1/1 white Scout creature token with lifelink.

card.name: Ruin Delvers
card.text: Menace Whenever Ruin Delvers attacks, you may put a creature card with mana value 3 or less from your hand or exiled on an Adventure onto the battlefield tapped and attacking. Return that creature to your hand at end of combat.

card.name: Sewer Skulk
card.text: Menace (This creature can't be blocked except by two or more creatures.) Whenever you draw your second card each turn, put a +1/+1 counter on Sewer Skulk.

card.name: Glorybound Cutthroat
card.text: Glorybound Cutthroat can't block. Whenever you sacrifice another creature or an artifact, put a +1/+1 counter on Glorybound Cutthroat. {3}{B}{R}, Sacrifice Glorybound Cutthroat: It deals damage equal to its power to target creature or planeswalker.

card.name: Imperial Musketeer
card.text: Whenever you create one or more creature tokens for the first time each turn, create a 1/1 white Soldier creature token. Whenever you create one or more noncreature tokens for the first time each turn, create a Weapon token. (It's an Equipment artifact with "Equipped creature gets +1/+1" and equip {2}.)

card.name: Cunning Quartermaster
card.text: When Cunning Quartermaster enters, search your library for a Vehicle card, reveal it, and put it into your hand. Then shuffle. Whenever Cunning Quartermaster crews a Vehicle, that Vehicle gets +1/+1 and gains trample until end of turn.

card.name: Azla, Dreadtide Captain
card.text: When Azla enters, mill four cards. {3}{B}{G}, Exile a creature you control: Return target creature card from your graveyard to the battlefield. It gains haste until end of turn and can't block this turn.

card.name: Loyal Deckhand
card.text: Whenever you cast an instant or sorcery spell, create a 1/1 white Scout creature token with lifelink.

card.name: Mara, Benthozoologist
card.text: Vigilance {T}: Add {G} or {U}. When you spend this mana to cast a Kraken, Leviathan, Octopus, or Serpent spell, that creature enters with a +1/+1 counter on it.

card.name: The Glorybound
card.text: Trample, haste Planeswalkers you control have "[+2]: Target permanent named The Glorybound becomes an artifact creature until your next turn." Crew 3

card.name: Beachside Barter
card.text: {1}, {T}, Sacrifice an artifact: Create a 2/1 black Pirate creature token with "This creature can't block." {1}, {T}, Sacrifice a creature: Draw a card. {1}, {T}, Discard a card: Plunder. (Create a Treasure token, or sacrifice an artifact to draw a card.)

card.name: M-80, Clockwork Crewmate
card.text: When M-80, Clockwork Crewmate enters, plunder. (Create a Treasure token, or sacrifice an artifact to draw a card.) Whenever you cast a spell, if mana from an artifact source was spent to cast it, create a 1/1 colorless Construct artifact creature token.

card.name: Animated Hoard
card.text: {T}, Sacrifice Animated Hoard: Add one mana of any color. {2}, Exile Animated Hoard and another artifact card from from your graveyard: Draw a card.

card.name: Marquisian Sentry
card.text: Whenever Marquisian Sentry enters or becomes tapped, surveil 1. (Look at the top card of your library. You may put it into your graveyard.)

card.name: Salvaged Stomper
card.text: Trample Sacrifice three Treasures: Return Salvaged Stomper from your graveyard to the battlefield tapped.

card.name: Lantern of the Lost
card.text: When Lantern of the Lost enters, exile target card from a graveyard. {1}, {T}, Exile Lantern of the Lost: Exile all cards from all graveyards, then draw a card.

card.name: Shoreline Beacon
card.text: When Shoreline Beacon enters, draw a card. {4}, {T}: Target artifact or creature can't be blocked this turn. If that permanent is a Vehicle, you may have it become a creature until end of turn.

card.name: Pillager's Galleon
card.text: Whenever Pillager's Galleon deals combat damage to a player or planeswalker, plunder. (Create a Treasure token, or sacrifice an artifact to draw a card.) Crew 1 (Tap any number of creatures you control with total power 1 or more: This Vehicle becomes an artifact creature until end of turn.)

card.name: Spectral Sloop
card.text: Vigilance Whenever Spectral Sloop deals combat damage to a player or planeswalker, create a tapped 2/2 black Zombie creature token. Crew 2

card.name: Ironworks Arsenal
card.text: Ironworks Arsenal enters with three arms counters on it. {T}, Remove an arms counter from Ironworks Arsenal: Create a Weapon token. You may attach it to up to one target creature. Activate only as a sorcery. (It's an Equipment artifact with "Equipped creature gets +1/+1" and equip {2}.)

card.name: Pilferer's Pouch
card.text: Pilferer's Pouch enters tapped with three coin counters on it. {T}, Remove a coin counter from Pilferer's Pouch: Plunder. (Create a Treasure token, or sacrifice an artifact to draw a card.)

card.name: Maelstrom Flagship
card.text: Flying Other Vehicles you control have flying. Crew 1 (Tap any number of creatures you control with total power 1 or more: This Vehicle becomes an artifact creature until end of turn.)

card.name: Veteran Cartographer
card.text: Vigilance You may look at the top card of your library any time. You may cast spells from the top of your library if they're Adventures or permanents with Adventures.

card.name: Journey's Preparation
card.text: When Journey's Preparation enters, search your library for an artifact card, reveal it, put it into your hand, then shuffle. Creatures you control crew Vehicles as though their power were 2 greater.

card.name: Tortun Vanguard
card.text: Vigilance At the beginning of combat on your turn, up to one target token you control becomes a 3/3 green and white Soldier creature with vigilance until end of turn.

card.name: Fleetcrusher Titan
card.text: Trample When Fleetcrusher Titan enters, destroy target nonland permanent you don't control. When Fleetcrusher Titan dies, create two 4/4 green Serpent creature tokens with trample.

card.name: Port Inspector
card.text: Whenever a creature or artifact an opponent controls is put into a graveyard from the battlefield, create a 1/1 white Soldier creature token. This ability triggers only once per turn.

card.name: Davijan's Awakening
card.text: Search your library for a creature card with mana value X or less and put it onto the battlefield with X additional +1/+1 counters on it. Then shuffle.

card.name: Wharf Rat
card.text: At the beginning of combat on your turn, you may put a Vehicle card from your hand onto the battlefield. It gains haste. Sacrifice it at the beginning of the next end step.

card.name: Ironworks Skysail
card.text: Flying, vigilance As long as you control three or more artifacts, Ironworks Skysail is an artifact creature. Crew 2

card.name: Protean Schooner
card.text: Whenever a creature with flying crews Protean Schooner, Protean Schooner gains flying until end of turn. The same is true for first strike, double strike, deathtouch, haste, hexproof, indestructible, lifelink, menace, reach, trample, and vigilance. Crew 2. Activate only once each turn.

card.name: Beyond the Horizon
card.text: Affinity for artifacts (This spell costs {1} less to cast for each artifact you control. After applying discounts to cast, you may sacrifice Treasures for mana to pay remaining costs.) If it isn't an extra turn, take an extra turn after this one. Exile Beyond the Horizon.

card.name: Hellfire Dreadnought
card.text: Trample When Hellfire Dreadnought enters, it deals 6 damage to up to one target creature or planeswalker. Crew 3

card.name: Hunter's Ambition
card.text: Choose one — • You draw three cards and you lose 3 life. • Each opponent sacrifices a creature of their choice with the greatest power among creatures they control. You gain 3 life.

card.name: Wayfinder's Telescope
card.text: Whenever equipped creature attacks, search your library for a basic land card, reveal it, put it into your hand, then shuffle. {W}{U}{B}{R}{G}, Sacrifice Wayfinder's Telescope: Draw two cards. Equip {1} ({1}: Attach to target creature you control. Equip only as a sorcery.)

card.name: Rising Tide
card.text: When Rising Tide enters, search your library for a land card and put it onto the battlefield tapped. Then shuffle. At the beginning of combat on your turn, untap target land you control. You may have it become an X/X Elemental creature with haste until end of turn, where X is the number of colors among permanents you control. It's still a land.

card.name: Cursed Coins
card.text: {T}: Put a greed counter on Cursed Coins. You lose X life and add X mana in any combination of colors, where X is the number of greed counters on Cursed Coins.

card.name: Restore Order
card.text: Create X 0/0 white Soldier Army creature tokens with "This creature gets +1/+1 for each creature you control."

card.name: Ghostblade Renegade
card.text: Ward—Pay 3 life. Whenever another nontoken Pirate you control dies, create a token that's a copy of it, except it's a 1/1 Spirit in addition to its other types and gains flying.

card.name: Salazar, Glorybound Mate
card.text: When Salazar, Glorybound Mate enters, plunder. (Create a Treasure token, or sacrifice an artifact to draw a card.) If a plunder ability would cause you to draw a card, you may instead search your library for a Pirate, Vehicle, Jadon, or Lilith card, reveal it, put it into your hand, then shuffle.

card.name: Behemoth of World's End
card.text: This spell can't be countered. Trample Hexproof from non-Adventure sources (This creature can't be the target of abilities or non-Adventure spells your opponents control.)

card.name: Stormforged Saber
Rum Guzzler
card.text: Haste Whenever Rum Guzzler attacks, reveal cards from the top of your library until you reveal exactly two nonland cards. Choose one of them. You may cast the chosen spell without paying its mana cost. Then target opponent may cast the spell not chosen this way without paying its mana cost. Then shuffle.

card.name: Grand Admiral
card.text: Prowess When Grand Admiral dies, create an X/X colorless Vehicle artifact token with crew 1, where X is Grand Admiral's power.

card.name: Sword of Greed and Glory
Novice Navigator
card.text: When Novice Navigator enters, create a 1/1 white Soldier creature token and a Weapon token. (It's an Equipment artifact with "Equipped creature gets +1/+1" and equip {2}.)

card.name: Dockside Warden // Brandish
card.text:
Double strike When Dockside Warden enters, you may put an Equipment card with mana value X or less from your hand onto the battlefield and attach it to Dockside Warden.
---
Search your library for an Equipment card, reveal it, then shuffle your library and put that card on top. (Then exile this card. You may cast the creature later from exile.)

card.name: Shipbreaker Kraken // Sink
card.text:
Ward {8} (Whenever this creature becomes the target of a spell or ability an opponent controls, counter it unless that player pays {8}.)
---
Put target artifact or enchantment on the bottom of its owner's library. (Then exile this card. You may cast the creature later from exile.)

card.name: Kiora, Voice of the Deep
card.text: [+1]: Look at the top two cards of your library. You may reveal a Kraken, Leviathan, Octopus, or Serpent card from among them and put both cards into your hand. Otherwise, put one of them into your hand. [-4]: Create an 8/8 blue Octopus creature token. [-7]: You get an emblem with "Whenever you cast a creature spell, search your library for a creature card with equal or lesser mana value and put it onto the battlefield. Then shuffle."

card.name: Lilith's Duplimancy
card.text: Copy target spell, then return that spell to its owner's hand. You may choose new targets for the copy. (Copying an Adventure doesn't cause a creature to go on an Adventure. A copy of a permanent spell becomes a token.)

card.name: Trenchlurker Titan // Here Be Monsters
card.text:
Ward {4} Trenchlurker Titan can't be blocked by Pirates or Vehicles.
---
Return target spell to its owner's hand. (Then exile this card. You may cast the creature later from exile.)

card.name: Audra, Raucous Rallier
card.text: Menace Whenever Audra deals combat damage to a player, exile the top card of that player's library. Until end of turn, you may cast that card, and mana of any color can be spent to cast it. Whenever you cast a spell from exile, create a 2/1 black Pirate creature token with "This creature can't block."

card.name: Starlight Wayfinder // Spiritual Voyage
card.text:
Flying, vigilance
---
Return to the battlefield target nonland permanent card in your graveyard that was put there from the battlefield this turn. (Then exile this card. You may cast the creature later from exile.)

card.name: Tideweaver Gull
card.text: Flying Whenever Tideweaver Gull attacks, if you've cast a noncreature spell this turn, tap target creature or artifact.

card.name: Standard-Issue Flintlock
card.text: When Standard-Issue Flintlock enters, create a 1/1 white Soldier creature token. Equipped creature gets +1/+1. Equip {2} ({2}: Attach to target creature you control. Equip only as a sorcery.)

card.name: Weathered Navigator // Clear Skies Ahead
card.text:
{2}{W}: Scry 1. (Look at the top card of your library. You may put that card on the bottom of your library.)
---
You gain 3 life. Scry 1. (Then exile this card. You may cast the creature later from exile.)

card.name: Landing Party
card.text: Lifelink

card.name: Conscripted Duelist
card.text: {2}, Exile Conscripted Duelist from your graveyard: Create a tapped 1/1 white Spirit creature token with flying.

card.name: Treasure Hunter
card.text: When Treasure Hunter enters, you may return target artifact card from your graveyard to your hand.

card.name: Edgeseeker Helmsman // Sailor's Salvo
card.text:
---
Target creature gets +2/+0 until end of turn. (Then exile this card. You may cast the creature later from exile.)

card.name: Ironworks Seahawk
card.text: Flying Artifact spells you cast cost {1} less to cast. Equip abilities you activate cost {1} less to activate.

card.name: Trade Route Navigators
card.text: When Trade Route Navigators enters, create a Weapon token, then you may attach it to another target creature you control. (It's an Equipment artifact with "Equipped creature gets +1/+1" and equip {2}.)

card.name: Governor's Representative // Enact Policy
card.text:
Whenever another creature you control enters, put a +1/+1 counter on Governor's Representative.
---
Exile target nontoken creature, then return it to the battlefield under its owner's control. (Then exile this card. You may cast the creature later from exile.)

card.name: Deft Commodore // Rally the Sailors
card.text:
When Deft Commodore enters, creatures you control get +1/+0 until end of turn.
---
Create two 1/1 white Soldier creature tokens. (Then exile this card. You may cast the creature later from exile.)

card.name: Imperial Bombardiers
card.text: This spell costs {1} less to cast for each creature you control. Vigilance

card.name: Quickdraw
card.text: Quickdraw deals 2 damage to target attacking or blocking creature. Create a Weapon token. (It's an Equipment artifact with "Equipped creature gets +1/+1" and equip {2}.)

card.name: High and Dry
card.text: Flash When High and Dry enters, exile up to one target creature or planeswalker until this enchantment leaves the battlefield.

card.name: Edgeseeker's Valor
card.text: Choose one — • Creatures you control get +1/+1 until end of turn. • Edgeseeker's Valor deals damage equal to the number of creatures you control to target tapped creature.

card.name: Parry
card.text: Target creature you control gets +2/+2 until end of turn. If you control an artifact, it also gains first strike until end of turn.

card.name: Shipwrecked
card.text: Put target artifact, enchantment, or card in a graveyard on the bottom of its owner's library.

card.name: Rally the Isles
card.text: Untap each permanent you control that's a creature and/or Vehicle, then put a +1/+1 counter on each of them.

card.name: Marquisian Officer
card.text: Flash When Marquisian Officer enters, you may return another target permanent you control to its owner's hand.

card.name: Loyal Quartermaster
card.text: {2}{U}: Draw a card, then discard a card.

card.name: Welkin Tern
card.text: Flying Welkin Tern can block only creatures with flying.

card.name: Crimza Taal Smuggler // Pickpocket
card.text:
As long as you've drawn two or more cards this turn, Crimza Taal Smuggler can't be blocked.
---
Draw a card, then discard a card. (Then exile this card. You may cast the creature later from exile.)

card.name: Aelython Renegade
card.text: When Aelython Renegade enters, plunder. (Create a Treasure token, or sacrifice an artifact to draw a card.)

card.name: Shipwreck Kraken
card.text: When Shipwreck Kraken enters, tap target creature or artifact an opponent controls and put a stun counter on it. (If a permanent with a stun counter would become untapped, remove one from it instead.)

card.name: Riptide Titan // Undertow
card.text:
Ward {3} (Whenever this creature becomes the target of a spell or ability an opponent controls, counter it unless that player pays {3}.)
---
Target creature gets -4/-0 until end of turn. (Then exile this card. You may cast the creature later from exile.)

card.name: Forgotten Chronicler
card.text: Defender As long as you've cast a noncreature spell this turn, Forgotten Chronicler can attack as though it didn't have defender.

card.name: Daring Rebuttal
card.text: Counter target spell. Plunder. (Create a Treasure token, or sacrifice an artifact to draw a card.)

card.name: Man Overboard
card.text: Counter target creature or planeswalker spell unless its controller pays {2}. If that spell was cast from exile, instead counter that spell, then scry 2.

card.name: Lost at Sea
card.text: Enchant creature or Vehicle When Lost at Sea enters, you may behold a Kraken, Leviathan, Octopus, or Serpent. If you do, tap enchanted permanent. (To behold a Kraken, Leviathan, Octopus, or Serpent, choose one you control or reveal one from your hand.) Enchanted permanent can't become untapped and its activated abilities can't be activated.

card.name: Thirst for Knowledge
card.text: Draw three cards. Then discard two cards unless you discard an artifact card.

card.name: Opt
card.text: Scry 1. Draw a card.

card.name: Whirlpool
card.text: Choose one or both — • Return target creature you control to its owner's hand. • Return target creature you don't control to its owner's hand.

card.name: Ghostly Galleon
card.text: When Ghostly Galleon enters, look at the top four cards of your library. You may reveal an artifact card from among them and put it into your hand. Put the rest on the bottom in a random order. Crew 3 (Tap any number of creatures you control with total power 3 or more: This Vehicle becomes an artifact creature until end of turn.)

card.name: Shore Up
card.text: Target creature you control gets +1/+1 and gains hexproof until end of turn. Untap it. (It can't be the target of spells or abilities your opponents control.)

card.name: Mithril Grouper
card.text: {2}{B}: Return this card from your graveyard to the battlefield tapped.

card.name: Arrogant Crewmate
card.text: When Arrogant Crewmate dies, plunder. (Create a Treasure token, or sacrifice an artifact to draw a card.)

card.name: Skyship Ambusher
card.text: Flash Flying When Skyship Ambusher enters, surveil 1. (Look at the top card of your library. You may put it into your graveyard.)

card.name: Crimza Taal Headhunter // Shank
card.text:
Deathtouch
---
Target creature gets -1/-1 until end of turn. (Then exile this card. You may cast the creature later from exile.)

card.name: Tandem Hirelings
card.text: When Tandem Hirelings enters, create a 2/1 black Pirate creature token with "This creature can't block."

card.name: Shipwreck Revenant
card.text: Lifelink Whenever you draw your second card each turn, each opponent loses 2 life and you gain 2 life.

card.name: Azla's Rotcrew // Serve Eternal
card.text:
Menace
---
Mill two cards. Create a 2/2 black Zombie creature token. (Then exile this card. You may cast the creature later from exile.)

card.name: Seabound Spirit // Covetous Greed
card.text:
Flying, deathtouch When Seabound Spirit dies, put it on the bottom of its owner's library.
---
Return target creature or artifact card from your graveyard to your hand. (Then exile this card. You may cast the creature later from exile.)

card.name: Glorybound Scallywags
card.text: When Glorybound Scallywags enters, target creature you don't control gets -X/-X until end of turn, where X is the number of creatures you control.

card.name: Poach
card.text: Destroy target creature or planeswalker. Plunder. (Create a Treasure token, or sacrifice an artifact to draw a card.)

card.name: Last Gasp
card.text: Target creature gets -3/-3 until end of turn.

card.name: Davijan's Curse
card.text: Target opponent reveals their hand. You may choose a nonland card from it. If you do, that player discards that card. If you don't, that player sacrifices a creature of their choice.

card.name: Almicar's Bargain
card.text: You draw two cards and you lose 2 life. Plunder. (Create a Treasure token, or sacrifice an artifact to draw a card.)

card.name: Dreadtide Ritual
card.text: Mill three cards, then you may put any number of creature and/or Vehicle cards from your graveyard on top of your library. (To mill three cards, put the top three cards of your library into your graveyard.) Draw a card.

card.name: No One Left Behind
card.text: This spell costs {3} less to cast if it targets a creature card with mana value 3 or less. Return target creature card from your graveyard to the battlefield.

card.name: Deathless Conscription
card.text: Until end of turn, target creature gains "When this creature dies, return it to the battlefield under its owner's control. When you do, plunder." (Create a Treasure token, or sacrifice an artifact to draw a card.)

card.name: Gemseeker Grottle
card.text: Haste When Gemseeker Grottle dies, plunder. (Create a Treasure token, or sacrifice an artifact to draw a card.)

card.name: Munitions Mage // Broadside
card.text:
Haste Munitions Mage can't block.
---
Target creature can't block this turn. (Then exile this card. You may cast the creature later from exile.)

card.name: Flintlock Sharpshot
card.text: Whenever Flintlock Sharpshot becomes tapped, it deals 1 damage to target player or planeswalker.

card.name: Trinket Merchant
card.text: When Trinket Merchant enters, plunder. (Create a Treasure token, or sacrifice an artifact to draw a card.)

card.name: Pyrebeard Buccaneer // Flare
card.text:
Prowess (Whenever you cast a noncreature spell, this creature gets +1/+1 until end of turn. Adventures are noncreature spells.)
---
Flare deals 2 damage to target player or planeswalker. (Then exile this card. You may cast the creature later from exile.)

card.name: Rowdy Cannoneer
card.text: Menace (This creature can't be blocked except by two or more creatures.) {1}, Sacrifice another creature or an artifact: Rowdy Cannoneer deals 1 damage to target player or planeswalker.

card.name: Cannonpack Crewmate // Fiery Barrage
card.text:
Reach
---
Fiery Barrage deals 1 damage to each creature you don't control. (Then exile this card. You may cast the creature later from exile.)

card.name: Savvy Duelist
card.text: During your turn, Savvy Duelist has first strike. Whenever you cast an Adventure spell or a spell from exile, Savvy Duelist deals 1 damage to target player or planeswalker.

card.name: Glorybound Knaves // Buccaneer's Blitz
card.text:
When Glorybound Knaves enters, you may sacrifice a creature or artifact. If you do, this creature deals 2 damage to any target.
---
Create a 2/1 black Pirate creature token with "This creature can't block." (Then exile this card. You may cast the creature later from exile.)

card.name: Become the Storm
card.text: This spell costs {2} less to cast if you control a creature with an Adventure. Become the Storm deals 3 damage to any target.

card.name: Cannonblast
card.text: Cannonblast deals 5 damage to target creature or planeswalker. If you controlled a Vehicle as you cast this spell, excess damage is dealt to that creature's or planeswalker's controller.

card.name: Unfair Share
card.text: Gain control of target creature or Vehicle until end of turn. Untap it. It gains haste until end of turn. Plunder. (Create a Treasure token, or sacrifice an artifact to draw a card.)

card.name: Audra's Vengeance
card.text: Creatures you control get +2/+0 until end of turn. Creatures you control with Adventures gain trample until end of turn.

card.name: Abandon Ship
card.text: As an additional cost to cast this spell, discard a card. Draw two cards. Plunder. (Create a Treasure token, or sacrifice an artifact to draw a card.)

card.name: Bombarding Brigantine
card.text: When Bombarding Brigantine enters, it deals 2 damage to target player or planeswalker. Crew 2 (Tap any number of creatures you control with total power 2 or more: This Vehicle becomes an artifact creature until end of turn.)

card.name: Tavern Brawl
card.text: Target creature gets +2/+2 until end of turn. If you've sacrificed a creature or artifact this turn, it gains trample until end of turn.

card.name: Dishonorable Duel
card.text: Choose one — • Destroy target artifact. • Put a +1/+1 counter on target attacking creature. It gains first strike until end of turn.

card.name: Glittering Trove
card.text: Whenever Glittering Trove enters or is put into a graveyard from the battlefield, create a 2/1 black Pirate creature token with "This creature can't block." {3}{R}, Discard a card, Sacrifice Glittering Trove: Draw a card.

card.name: Flourishing Reef
card.text: Enchant land When Flourishing Reef enters the battlefield, create a 1/1 blue Fish creature token. Enchanted land has "{T}: Add one mana of any color."

card.name: Trenchcaller Champion
card.text: When Trenchcaller Champion enters or dies, surveil 1. (Look at the top card of your library. You may put it into your graveyard.)

card.name: Trenchcaller Vassal
card.text: {T}: Add {G}. When you spend this mana to cast a Kraken, Leviathan, Octopus, or Serpent spell, put a +1/+1 counter on this creature.

card.name: Marquisian Seafarer // Steady Sailing
card.text:
Vigilance {T}: Untap target basic land.
---
Search your library for a basic land card, reveal it, put it into your hand, then shuffle. (Then exile this card. You may cast the creature later from exile.)

card.name: Octoplant
card.text: When Octoplant enters, look at the top three cards of your library. You may reveal a creature or land card from among them and put it into your hand. Put the rest into your graveyard.

card.name: Dreadtide Deckhands
card.text: When Dreadtide Deckhands enters, create a 2/2 black Zombie creature token.

card.name: Aelython Vanguard // Siren's Song
card.text:
---
Put a +1/+1 counter on target creature. It must be blocked this turn if able. (Then exile this card. You may cast the creature later from exile.)

card.name: Curio Collectors
card.text: When Curio Collectors enters, plunder. (Create a Treasure token, or sacrifice an artifact to draw a card.)

card.name: Tortun Cannoneers // Aim True
card.text:
Vigilance, reach
---
Target creature gets +2/+2 and gains reach until end of turn. Untap it. (Then exile this card. You may cast the creature later from exile.)

card.name: Benthic Behemoth
card.text: This spell costs {1} less to cast for each creature card in your graveyard. When Benthic Behemoth enters, you gain 4 life.

card.name: Ancient Megalodon // Chum Trail
card.text:
Ancient Megalodon can't be blocked by more than one creature.
---
Create a 3/3 green Shark creature token. (Then exile this card. You may cast the creature later from exile.)

card.name: Run Through
card.text: Target creature you control fights target creature you don't control. When the creature you don't control dies this turn, plunder. (Create a Treasure token, or sacrifice an artifact to draw a card.)

card.name: Breach the Surface
card.text: Until end of turn, target creature gets +3/+3, gains trample, and becomes a Leviathan in addition to its other types.

card.name: Tavern Revelry
card.text: Target permanent gains hexproof until end of turn. Prevent all damage that would be dealt to it this turn.

card.name: Marquisian Crackdown
card.text: Destroy target artifact, enchantment, or creature with flying. Create a 1/1 white Soldier creature token.

card.name: Inkforged Arsenal
card.text: Enchant creature Enchanted creature has trample. {4}{G}: Put a +1/+1 counter on enchanted creature.

card.name: Sunken Spoils
card.text: Return up to one target permanent card from your graveyard to your hand. Plunder. (Create a Treasure token, or sacrifice an artifact to draw a card.)

card.name: Kiora's Beckoning
card.text: Choose one — • Search your library for a basic land card, put that card onto the battlefield tapped, then shuffle. • Search your library for a Kraken, Leviathan, Octopus, or Serpent card, reveal that card, put it into your hand, then shuffle.

card.name: Beachcomber's Bane
card.text: Trample Whenever a permanent with an Adventure you control enters, put a +1/+1 counter on Beachcomber's Bane. (It doesn't need to have gone on the Adventure first.)

card.name: Aureate Elemental
card.text: When Aureate Elemental enters, scry 2. When Aureate Elemental dies, draw a card.

card.name: Expedition Map
card.text: {2}, {T}, Sacrifice Expedition Map: Search your library for a land card, reveal it, put it into your hand, then shuffle.

card.name: Glittering Spoils
card.text: When Glittering Spoils enters, you may draw a card. If you do, discard a card. {T}: Add one mana of any color.

card.name: Pirate's Cutlass
card.text: When Pirate's Cutlass enters, attach it to target Pirate you control. Equipped creature gets +2/+1. Equip {2} ({2}: Attach to target creature you control. Equip only as a sorcery.)

card.name: Rusted Mariner
card.text: When Rusted Mariner enters, plunder. (Create a Treasure token, or sacrifice an artifact to draw a card.)

card.name: Towering Dreadnought
card.text: Trample Crew 3 (Tap any number of creatures you control with total power 3 or more: This Vehicle becomes an artifact creature until end of turn.) Pirate Crew 1 (Tap any number of Pirates you control with total power 1 or greater: This Vehicle becomes an artifact creature until end of turn.)

card.name: Voyager's Vessel
card.text: When Voyager's Vessel enters, you may search your library for a basic land card, reveal it, put it into your hand, then shuffle. Crew 2 (Tap any number of creatures you control with total power 2 or more: This Vehicle becomes an artifact creature until end of turn.)

card.name: Captain's Orders
card.text: Create two 1/1 white Soldier creature tokens. Then if you control four or more creatures, each opponent loses 2 life and you gain 2 life.

card.name: Ravenous Wavekite
card.text: Flying Sacrifice five other artifacts and/or creatures: Ravenous Wavekite deals 5 damage to each opponent.

card.name: Rapacious Tyrant
card.text: Flying, haste When Rapacious Tyrant enters, you may discard your hand. If you do, plunder seven times. (To plunder, create a Treasure token, or sacrifice an artifact to draw a card.)

card.name: Ironworks Shipwrights // Wrought to War
card.text:
Artifact creatures you control get +1/+0.
---
Target Vehicle you control becomes an artifact creature until end of turn. (Then exile this card. You may cast the creature later from exile.)

card.name: Dragon-Eye Lookout
card.text: Whenever Dragon-Eye Lookout attacks, you may sacrifice two Treasures. If you do, create a 4/4 red Dragon creature token that's tapped and attacking.

card.name: Dawson's Ire
card.text: Each player sacrifices a creature or planeswalker of their choice. If you sacrificed a permanent this way, draw a card.

card.name: Ship-Scale Behemoth
card.text: Trample You may have Ship-Scale Behemoth enter as a copy of any creature or artifact on the battlefield, except it's a 6/6 Leviathan in addition to its other types and has trample.

card.name: Hemophage Hunter // Scent of Blood
card.text:
Ward—Pay 3 life. At the beginning of your end step, each opponent loses X life and you gain X life, where X is the number of cards you've drawn this turn.
---
Draw a card. Each opponent discards a card. (Then exile this card. You may cast the creature later from exile.)

card.name: Tidal Visionary
card.text: When Tidal Visionary enters, draw a card.

card.name: Serpent KRK
card.text: Trample

card.name: On An Adventure KRK
card.text: After an Adventure resolves, you can place the exiled card here. You may cast the creature from exile.

card.name: Daring Adventures KRK
card.text: {2}, {T}: Draw a card.

card.name: Treasure KRK
card.text: {T}, Sacrifice this artifact: Add one mana of any color.

card.name: Weapon KRK
card.text: Equipped creature gets +1/+1. Equip {2}

card.name: Vehicle KRK
card.text: Crew 1 (Tap any number of creatures you control with total power 1 or more: This token becomes an artifact creature until end of turn.)

card.name: Search Beyond the Empire
card.text: When Search Beyond the Empire enters, look at the top five cards of your library. You may reveal a creature card from among them and put it into your hand. Put the rest on the bottom in a random order. Permanent spells you cast with an Adventure cost {1} less to cast. (They don't need to have gone on the Adventure first.)

card.name: Rallying Lookout
card.text: Haste Whenever a creature with an Adventure you control enters, that creature gets +1/+0 and gains haste until end of turn. (It doesn't need to have gone on the Adventure first.)

card.name: The One That Got Away
card.text: Exile target creature you control, then return it to the battlefield under its owner's control. When it enters, you may cast a copy of its Adventure. (You still pay its costs.)

card.name: Boundless Horizons
card.text: Whenever you attack, exile target attacking creature you own, then return it to the battlefield tapped and attacking. If it's a Vehicle, it becomes an artifact creature until end of turn.

card.name: Grottle Shell-Singer
card.text: At the beginning of your end step, if you cast a noncreature spell this turn, plunder. (Create a Treasure token, or sacrifice an artifact to draw a card.)

card.name: Gilded Cove
card.text: {T}: Add {C}. {1}, {T}: Add one mana of any color. {4}, {T}: Plunder (Create a Treasure token, or sacrifice an artifact to draw a card.)

card.text:
Flash Emperor's Executioner can't block.
---
Each opponent sacrifices a creature or planeswalker of their choice. (Then exile this card. You may cast the creature later from exile.)

card.name: Sunken Casket
card.text: When Sunken Casket is put into a graveyard from the battlefield, create a tapped 2/2 black Zombie creature token. {6}, {T}, Sacrifice Sunken Casket: Target creature gets -6/-6 until end of turn.

card.name: Reefbed Hatchling
card.text: {5}{U}, Sacrifice Reefbed Hatchling: Reveal the top eight cards of your library. You may put a Kraken, Leviathan, Octopus, or Serpent card from among them onto the battlefield. Put the rest on the bottom of your library in a random order. Activate only as a sorcery.

card.name: Dreadtide Marauder
card.text: When Dreadtide Marauder enters, you may sacrifice another creature or an artifact. When you do, destroy target creature, planeswalker, or Vehicle. When Dreadtide Marauder dies, create two 2/1 black Pirate creature tokens with "This creature can't block."

card.name: Wavebreaker Brute // Risky Venture
card.text:
Vigilance, trample
---
Discard a card, then draw a card. You may put a land card from your hand onto the battlefield. (Then exile this card. You may cast the creature later from exile.)

card.name: Storm Coast Drakemaster
card.text: When Storm Coast Drakemaster enters, create a 1/1 blue Drake creature token with flying.

card.name: Everywhere KRK
card.text: This land is a Plains, Island, Swamp, Mountain, and Forest. ({T}: Add {W}, {U}, {B}, {R}, or {G}.)

card.name: Loose Cargo
card.text: When Loose Cargo enters, each opponent discards a card. {3}{B}{B}, Sacrifice Loose Cargo: Create two 2/1 black Pirate creature tokens with "This creature can't block."

card.name: Curse of Siren's Song
card.text: Enchant player Whenever a permanent card is put into enchanted player's graveyard from anywhere, return it to the battlefield under your control with a finality counter on it. (If a permanent with a finality counter would be put into a graveyard, exile it instead.)

card.name: Glutton of Fool's Strait
card.text: Trample Other Krakens, Leviathans, Octopuses, and Serpents you control have trample.

card.name: Maelstrom's Maw
card.text: When Maelstrom's Maw enters, create a 4/4 green Serpent creature token with trample. Whenever you cast a Kraken, Leviathan, Octopus, or Serpent spell, you may return Maelstrom's Maw to its owner's hand.

card.name: Marooned Mutineer
card.text: Marooned Mutineer can't block. Marooned Mutineer has haste as long as you control an artifact.

card.name: Hired Hand
card.text: First strike, haste Whenever Hired Hand deals combat damage to a player or planeswalker, if you spent mana from a Treasure to cast a spell this turn, create a 2/1 black Pirate creature token with "This creature can't block."

card.name: Eye of the Eight Winds
card.text: {T}: Add {C}. {T}: Add one mana of any color. Spend this mana only to cast Kraken, Leviathan, Octopus, or Serpent spells. {8}: Eye of the Eight Winds becomes an 8/8 Octopus creature until end of turn.

card.name: Lilith, Seafaring Scribe
card.text: As Lilith enters, create Daring Adventures, a legendary colorless artifact token with "{2}, {T}: Draw a card." [+1]: Tap or untap up to one target artifact and up to one target creature. [-3]: Create two 1/1 blue Drake creature tokens with flying. [-7]: You get an emblem with "Whenever an opponent casts their first spell each turn, you gain control of it and may choose new targets."

card.text: This token can't block.

card.text: This token can't block.

Return target artifact or creature to its owner's hand. (Then exile this card. You may cast the creature later from exile.)

card.name: Corsair's Companion
card.text: Flying Whenever Corsair's Companion becomes tapped, another target creature or Vehicle you control gains flying until end of turn.

card.name: Thieving Accomplice
card.text: Flying Whenever an artifact you control enters, Thieving Accomplice gets +1/+1 until end of turn. If that artifact was a Vehicle, instead put a +1/+1 counter on Thieving Accomplice.

card.name: Uncharted Haven
card.text: Uncharted Haven enters tapped. As it enters, choose a color. {T}: Add one mana of the chosen color.

card.name: Tortun Turncoat
card.text: When Tortun Turncoat enters, it deals 2 damage to target player or planeswalker and you gain 2 life.

card.name: Corsair Firebomb
Hellfire Volley
card.text: Plunder. (Create a Treasure token, or sacrifice an artifact to draw a card.) Hellfire Volley deals 2 damage to each creature.

card.name: Lilith, Seafaring Scribe Emblem KRK
card.text: Whenever an opponent casts their first spell each turn, you gain control of it and may choose new targets.

card.name: Kiora, Voice of the Deep Emblem KRK
card.text: Whenever you cast a creature spell, search your library for a creature card with equal or lesser mana value and put it onto the battlefield. Then shuffle.

card.name: Pirate Token (D) KRK
card.text: This token can't block.
